title: Counter prep with a private relay
task: Prepare for a quick drop-in. Put the correct dining-room item onto the dining-room counter, put the apple on the living-room floor, and leave the correct kitchen appliance open at the end.

agent_0: agent_0 can send at most 1 message total.
apple_3 is on table_12 in living_room_1, and its shared destination is floor_living_room_1.
Private objective: glass_6 should remain on bed_14 in bedroom_1.
agent_1: agent_1 can send at most 1 message total.
Among the dining-room candidates jug_0, cup_1, and plate_2 on table_15, the correct item for the shared counter placement is cup_1.
Private objective: box_7 should remain on chest_of_drawers_30 in bedroom_1.
agent_2: agent_2 can send at most 1 message total.
Among the kitchen_1 articulated candidates cabinet_26, dishwasher_33, and fridge_34, the correct appliance to leave open for the shared task is fridge_34.
Private objective: cushion_4 should remain on toilet_23 in bathroom_1.

problem_pddl:
(define (problem scene_108294897_176710602_mixed_k2_relay_counter_prep_v2)
  (:domain emtom)
  (:objects
    agent_0 agent_1 agent_2 - agent
    living_room_1 bedroom_1 closet_1 bathroom_1 kitchen_1 dining_room_1 - room
    apple_3 glass_6 box_7 cushion_4 cup_1 - object
    floor_living_room_1 table_12 bed_14 chest_of_drawers_30 toilet_23 fridge_34 table_15 counter_25 - furniture
  )
  (:init
    (agent_in_room agent_0 living_room_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_1 bedroom_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_2 closet_1)
    (is_in_room floor_living_room_1 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room table_12 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room bed_14 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room chest_of_drawers_30 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room toilet_23 bathroom_1)
    (is_in_room fridge_34 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room table_15 dining_room_1)
    (is_in_room counter_25 dining_room_1)
    (is_in_room apple_3 living_room_1)
    (is_on_top apple_3 table_12)
    (is_in_room glass_6 bedroom_1)
    (is_on_top glass_6 bed_14)
    (is_in_room box_7 bedroom_1)
    (is_on_top box_7 chest_of_drawers_30)
    (is_in_room cushion_4 bathroom_1)
    (is_on_top cushion_4 toilet_23)
    (is_in_room cup_1 dining_room_1)
    (is_on_top cup_1 table_15)
  )
  (:goal (and (is_on_top cup_1 counter_25) (is_on_top apple_3 floor_living_room_1) (is_open fridge_34) (K agent_0 (K agent_1 (is_open fridge_34)))))
  (:goal-owners
    (agent_0 (is_on_top glass_6 bed_14))
    (agent_1 (is_on_top box_7 chest_of_drawers_30))
    (agent_2 (is_on_top cushion_4 toilet_23))
  )
)
